productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Black John Shorts
description: Composition Grey and black shorts made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, has two insert pockets on the sides, a wide elasticated waistband with drawstrings inside, panel stitched to the sides and back, printed branding on the left thigh and a coin pocket inside the left insert pocket. Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, tumble dry, wring, iron directly on print/embroidery or dry clean Dry inside out in shade Warm iron inside out Shorts are the most comfortable bottoms to wear whatever the season. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, or relaxing at home. Model statistics The product is a size 32, length 16.5" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
